name: conservative-core
mandate: Trade BTCB, ETH and WBNB on BSC. Keep max drawdown at 15%, daily loss 4%, max position 12%, stable reserve 30%, slippage 0.4%, kill switch at 18%, at least 1 trade per day, no leverage.

name: momentum-rotator
mandate: Trade WBNB, ETH, BTCB, CAKE and LINK on BSC. Max drawdown 22%, daily loss 7%, max position 18%, stable reserve 12%, slippage 0.8%, kill switch 26%, 2 trades per day, no leverage.

name: sentiment-contrarian
mandate: Trade CAKE, UNI, AAVE, LINK and DOT on BSC. Max drawdown 28%, daily loss 9%, max position 20%, stable reserve 8%, slippage 1.0%, kill switch 32%, 3 trades per day, no leverage.

name: defensive-stablefirst
mandate: Trade BTCB and WBNB on BSC. Keep max drawdown at 10%, daily loss 3%, max position 8%, stable reserve 40%, slippage 0.3%, kill switch at 12%, at least 1 trade per day, no leverage.

name: breakout-rider
mandate: Trade WBNB, ETH, CAKE, AVAX and INJ on BSC. Max drawdown 25%, daily loss 8%, max position 20%, stable reserve 10%, slippage 0.9%, kill switch 28%, 2 trades per day, no leverage.

name: regime-ensemble
mandate: Meta-strategy: blend the four Track-2 strategy skills (trend-breakout-momentum, cmc-regime-routed-alpha, funding-rate-carry, mean-reversion-chop) by the currently classified market regime, using the per-regime weights in skills/ensemble.json. Renormalize blended risk to <= 100% and hold the remainder as a USDT reserve. The Rust risk engine remains the sole execution gate.
